result.stdout:
DumpOnException
Copyright 2021

USAGE:
Creating dump for each exception.:
  dotnet dumponexception "dotnet run"
Filter exception before creating a memory dump:
  dotnet dumponexception --filter=^DivideByZeroException$ "dotnet run"

  -a, --attach          Attach the debugger when the exception happens.
  -f, --filter          Applies a regex exception filter to trigger the dump.
  -d, --directory       Sets the folder destination of the dump.
  -t, --threshold       Sets the memory threshold in megabytes to create a dump.
  -p, --periodic-min    Sets the periodic timeout in minutes to create a dump.
  --help                Display this help screen.
  --version             Display version information.
